meaning: 里维埃拉[南欧沿地中海一地区]
examples: She is sampling gastronomic delights along the Riviera.
The taxi drew up in front of the Riviera Club.
Violent storms wreaked havoc on the French Riviera, leaving three people dead and dozens injured.
Some visitors compare it to a Greek fishing village, others to a glamorous town on the French Riviera.
Rose made the most of near-perfect conditions to collect seven birdies at the Riviera Country Club.
